## Extension

- **New or update:** <!-- new | update -->

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Permissions

<!-- List each permission you declare and why it is needed. Least privilege. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Directory name equals `manifest.name`.
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs <name>` passes locally.
- [ ] `README.md` is present with a short description.
- [ ] `marketplace.icon` is set (SVG, or square PNG ≥256×256).
- [ ] At least one `marketplace.screenshots` entry (PNG, 1600×1000).
- [ ] Only permissions actually used are declared.
- [ ] Source is readable (not minified/obfuscated).
- [ ] Bumped `version` if this updates an existing extension.
